title: HivePlayerEventPayload
description: Payload shape for ledger event_type=hive.player_event (C-341 citizen_history write-back). Pseudonymous, unauthenticated lab_source=hive lane.

target_id.description: Identifier of the thing acted upon, e.g. 'node-0'

cycle_id.description: Mobius cycle in which the event occurred, e.g. 'C-341'

civic_id.description: Pseudonymous mobius-anon-<id>; duplicated from the top-level attestation civic_id for convenience
